# connect-cdc-mysql Skill Source Map

Maps each file in `skills/connect-cdc-mysql/` to the source paths it derives from, so future
syncs and human maintainers know exactly where to verify claims.

The `mysql_cdc` input (binlog/row CDC for MySQL and MariaDB) is Go source in the **public**
repo `redpanda-data/connect` under `internal/impl/mysql/`; the user-facing reference is an
**auto-generated** connector page. That page is generated from the Go config spec and lives
in two public places: the in-repo autogenerated copy `redpanda-data/connect` →
`docs/modules/components/pages/inputs/mysql_cdc.adoc` (header literally says "THIS FILE IS
AUTOGENERATED"), and the published copy `redpanda-data/rp-connect-docs` →
`modules/components/pages/inputs/mysql_cdc.adoc`, whose field descriptions are overridden via
`redpanda-data/rp-connect-docs` → `docs-data/overrides.json`. All repos are public — read them
via the Redpanda-Github-Read MCP connector (`get_file_contents`) or `gh api .../contents/`;
avoid `gh search code` (rate-limited). `mysql_cdc` was introduced in Redpanda Connect
**4.45.0** and is an **Enterprise** connector (`license.CheckRunningEnterprise` at startup).
Connect is versioned — verify against the current stable release tag, not just `main`.

Scope note: MySQL/MariaDB **server** setup (my.cnf, RDS/Aurora parameter groups, Cloud SQL,
Azure) and Redpanda **broker/topic** enterprise properties (Iceberg, Tiered Storage, Schema ID
Validation) are external to the connector — see "Deferred / external" below.

## File-to-source table

| Skill file | redpanda-data/connect source paths | docs sources |
|---|---|---|
| `SKILL.md` | `internal/impl/mysql/input_mysql_stream.go` (config spec, snapshot→stream flow, metadata `operation`/`table`/`binlog_position`/`schema`), `snapshot.go` (`FLUSH TABLES <tables> WITH READ LOCK`, keyset pagination), `validate.go` (table-name rules), `internal/cli/flags_redpanda.go` (`--redpanda-license`, `REDPANDA_LICENSE`, secrets) | `modules/components/pages/inputs/mysql_cdc.adoc` (rp-connect-docs, published generated page); Iceberg/Tiered-Storage/Schema-ID-Validation claims → redpanda-data/docs (unverified — see TODO) |
| `references/config-reference.md` | `internal/impl/mysql/input_mysql_stream.go` (field list, types, defaults, required flags), `schema.go` + `TYPES.md` (MySQL→Go type mapping), `validate.go` (`tables` non-empty, name rules, `max_parallel_snapshot_tables >= 1`), `aws/aws.go` (IAM `aws` block sub-fields) | `docs/modules/components/pages/inputs/mysql_cdc.adoc` (connect, autogenerated) and `modules/components/pages/inputs/mysql_cdc.adoc` (rp-connect-docs); field descriptions overridden in `docs-data/overrides.json` (rp-connect-docs) |
| `references/pipeline-and-output.md` | `internal/impl/mysql/input_mysql_stream.go` (checkpoint-after-ack, `checkpoint_limit` in-flight, XID/transaction-boundary checkpointing, `OnTableChanged` schema-cache invalidation, new-row-image on UPDATE at index 1), `snapshot.go` (`SHOW BINARY LOG STATUS`→`SHOW MASTER STATUS` fallback, snapshot start position) | `modules/components/pages/inputs/mysql_cdc.adoc` (rp-connect-docs) for metadata/batching shape |
| `references/enterprise-features.md` | `internal/impl/mysql/input_mysql_stream.go` (`license.CheckRunningEnterprise`), `internal/cli/flags_redpanda.go` (license flag/env/default-path precedence, `${secrets.NAME}` via `resolveSecret`/`secretsFlag`) | Iceberg / Tiered Storage / Schema ID Validation / licensing property tables → redpanda-data/docs: `get-started/licensing/overview.adoc`, `get-started/licensing/disable-enterprise-features.adoc`, `manage/iceberg/*.adoc`, `reference/.../topic-properties.adoc` (cited in the file but **not verified** — see TODO) |
| `references/setup-mysql.md` | Connector-behavior claims only: `snapshot.go` (`FLUSH TABLES <tables> WITH READ LOCK`, keyset pagination), `input_mysql_stream.go` (`SHOW BINARY LOG STATUS` vs `SHOW MASTER STATUS`, single-`dsn` for both snapshot and stream), `validate.go`. **Server-side setup is external** (see below). | — |

## Deferred to live introspection / auto-generation (NOT drift — do not hardcode)

The `mysql_cdc` field list, types, defaults, and "required" flags are **auto-generated** from
the Go config spec in `internal/impl/mysql/input_mysql_stream.go`:

- The connector reference page is machine-generated (header: "THIS FILE IS AUTOGENERATED! To make changes, edit the corresponding source file under internal/impl/<provider>"). Treat the **generated rp-connect-docs page** as the published citation of record, and `docs-data/overrides.json` (has a `mysql_cdc` entry) as the source of the human-written **field descriptions**. Regenerate via `npx doc-tools generate rpcn-connector-docs`; do not hand-edit generated field text.
- Per-field defaults in `config-reference.md` (e.g. `checkpoint_key: mysql_binlog_position`, `snapshot_max_batch_size: 1000`, `max_reconnect_attempts: 10`, `checkpoint_limit: 1024`, `max_parallel_snapshot_tables: 1`, `auto_replay_nacks: true`) must be re-read from the generated page / `input_mysql_stream.go` on each sync.
- `rpk connect lint` / `rpk connect run` behavior is the external Redpanda Connect binary (managed plugin), not defined in `redpanda-data/redpanda`.

## Deferred / external (not `redpanda-data/connect` source)

- **MySQL / MariaDB server setup** (`setup-mysql.md` sections 1, 2, 4–8): binlog config in my.cnf, replication grants, RDS/Aurora parameter groups + IAM DB auth, Google Cloud SQL, Azure Database for MySQL, GTID — MySQL/cloud-vendor behavior, external to the connector.
- **Redpanda broker/topic enterprise properties** in `enterprise-features.md` (`iceberg_enabled`, `redpanda.iceberg.*`, `redpanda.remote.write/read`, `cloud_storage_enabled`, `enable_schema_id_validation`, `redpanda.*.schema.id.validation`, retention props): Redpanda broker config, defined in `redpanda-data/redpanda` (`src/v/config/configuration.cc`), documented in `redpanda-data/docs`. The connector only produces to these topics.

## TODO / re-verify

- **redpanda-data/docs paths cited in `enterprise-features.md` were NOT verified** this pass (`get-started/licensing/overview.adoc`, `disable-enterprise-features.adoc`, `manage/iceberg/*.adoc`, `reference/.../topic-properties.adoc`). Confirm exact module/path before treating as citations of record.
- `enterprise-features.md` references a local checkout path `/tmp/redpanda-skills-src` — a scratch dir, **not a durable source location**. Replace with canonical GitHub paths.
- Property **defaults/accepted-values** in the enterprise tables are broker config — re-verify against `src/v/config/configuration.cc` / docs property partials, not the connector.
- The `endpoint` requiredness under `aws` (skill says "required when `aws.enabled=true`"): the generated page marks `aws.endpoint` `# No default (required)` unconditionally — confirm conditional-required semantics in `internal/impl/mysql/aws/aws.go`.
- Confirm which Connect **release tag** the skill targets and re-verify field list/defaults against that tag (this pass read `main`).

## Usage

For each file being reviewed or updated, open the listed source paths first and confirm every
claim still matches. Verify against the current stable release tag of `redpanda-data/connect`,
treat the `mysql_cdc` field list/defaults/descriptions as auto-generated (regenerate rather than
hand-edit), and re-confirm exact field names, defaults, and metadata keys before writing any new
fact. For server-side and broker/topic-property claims, verify against the external sources noted
above, not the connect repo.
